description:
Manual games allow you to set custom check locations and custom item names that will be rolled into a multiworld.
This allows any variety of game -- PC, console, board games, Microsoft Word memes... really anything -- to be part of a multiworld randomizer.
The key component to including these games is some level of manual restriction. Since the items are not actually withheld from the player,
the player must manually refrain from using these gathered items until the tracker shows that they have been acquired or sent.

v0.2.0.description:
There have been a couple of breaking changes between the last version and this one, so I urge you to refer to the .yaml file or generate a new template after installing the APWorld.

You'll see this version no longer uses the unstable Manual, I decided it would be better to later create a separate release for unstable, once I'm able to.

A few of the changes I've made:
* Passwords are now progression items, with locations added to mark off as they are claimed.
* Other requests have been added as locations, how many of them are included can be configured.
* Max value for available and required totals for the Wish Hunt settings have been raised to 200.
* There are now checks to tweak the settings and lower the chance of generation failure.
* Checking story progression has been reworked to be a little more intuitive, hopefully.
* Default filler has been replaced with bombs, food or recovery items you can buy at the various shops of Castele without requiring any upgrades
* Implemented logic for location requirements

And some plans for the future:
* Include alternate locations for experience and skill level ups
* Include item restrictions
* Figure out other ways to make this apworld interesting and doable for playing
v0.2.0.title: v0.2.0 - Stable

## What's Changed
* Dev main by @JBtheShadow in https://github.com/JBtheShadow/APManuals/pull/8
* Requires UT 0.2.13 for tracking/highlighting, as UT 0.2.14 foregoes the create_items step, making it incompatible with the current manual stable


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JBtheShadow/APManuals/compare/v0.3.0...v0.3.1
